user_query: I just noticed Day 2 has no breakfast, my first meeting is at 9am and I'll be starving. Add a quick hotel breakfast before the meeting.

fields.name: Hotel Quick Breakfast (Grab & Go)
fields.description: Light, fast breakfast in the hotel dining area or grab-and-go from the lobby cafe — pastries, yogurt, fruit, coffee and tea. Designed to be quick so you can arrive at your 9:00 AM meeting on time.

insertion_point.reasoning: Meeting starts at 9:00 AM so a 8:00–8:30 AM hotel breakfast ensures a quick meal and short walk to the meeting. Inserted at position 0 to place it before the 9:00 AM Client Kickoff Meeting.
